data.name: Welcome.Subtitle
data.value: Your financial journey continues. Here is a quick overview of your accounts.

data.name: Action.Portfolio.Description
data.value: See your complete asset allocation and performance.

data.name: Action.Transactions.Description
data.value: Review your recent account activity and history.

data.name: Action.Statements.Description
data.value: Download and review your account statements.

data.name: Hero.Description
data.value: Comprehensive financial planning, wealth management, and powerful analytics tools. See your complete financial picture in one secure place.

data.name: Features.Title
data.value: Everything You Need to Manage Your Wealth

data.name: Features.Subtitle
data.value: From tracking your net worth to planning for the future, RAJ Financial provides the tools and insights you need to make smarter financial decisions.

data.name: Feature.NetWorth.Description
data.value: Get a complete picture of your assets and liabilities. Track your net worth over time with beautiful charts and detailed breakdowns.

data.name: Feature.BankLinking.Description
data.value: Securely connect your bank accounts, credit cards, and investment accounts to automatically sync balances and transactions.

data.name: Feature.Analytics.Description
data.value: AI-powered insights help you understand your spending patterns and identify opportunities to grow your wealth faster.

data.name: Feature.DebtPayoff.Description
data.value: Compare debt payoff strategies like Avalanche and Snowball methods. See exactly when you will be debt-free and how much you will save.

data.name: Feature.Insurance.Description
data.value: Calculate your life insurance needs based on your income, dependents, debts, and future goals. Never be under or over-insured again.

data.name: Feature.Beneficiaries.Description
data.value: Keep your beneficiary designations organized and up-to-date. Ensure your assets go where you want them to.

data.name: HowItWorks.Subtitle
data.value: Start your journey to financial clarity today. It only takes a few minutes.

data.name: Step.1.Description
data.value: Sign up for free with your email or use your existing Microsoft, Google, or Apple account. No credit card required.

data.name: Step.2.Description
data.value: Securely link your bank accounts, investment accounts, and credit cards. We use bank-level encryption to keep your data safe.

data.name: Step.3.Description
data.value: Get instant insights into your net worth, spending patterns, and opportunities to improve your financial health.

data.name: Security.Title
data.value: Your Data is Safe With Us

data.name: Security.Subtitle
data.value: We take security seriously. Your financial data is protected with enterprise-grade security.

data.name: Security.Encryption.Description
data.value: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest using industry-standard AES-256 encryption.

data.name: Security.ReadOnly.Description
data.value: We only have read access to your accounts. We can never move money or make transactions.

data.name: Security.NoSelling.Description
data.value: We never sell your personal or financial data to third parties. Your data is yours.

data.name: Security.Delete.Description
data.value: You can disconnect accounts and delete your data completely at any time with one click.

data.name: CTA.Description
data.value: Join users who have transformed their financial lives with RAJ Financial. Start your journey today - it is free.

data.name: Footer.Copyright
data.value: {0} RAJ Financial Software. All rights reserved.
